headline: A Look At Estée Lauder (EL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent Stock Performance Snapshot Estée Lauder Companies (EL) has recently experienced a 3.6% decline in its share price over the past day, extending to a 21.8% move in the past week and a larger pullback over the past month. See our latest analysis for Estée Lauder Companies. That short term drop sits against a 30 day share price return of a 38.59% decline and a year to date share price return of a 37.03% decline, while the 1 year total shareholder return is still 4.4%.
